messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a biotech vaccine R&D pipeline presentation for investors. Save as 'Vaccine_R_D_Pipeline.pptx', write in French, and use 16:9 Widescreen landscape orientation. The style should be clean clinical white and teal with precise data visualizations. Do not call any external APIs or scrape the web; hardcode all data points locally. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE rather than ChartType for chart generation. Also, ensure you check that slide.shapes.title is not None before attempting to update its .text property.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0, 139, 139)
COLOR_TEAL_DARK = RGBColor(0, 77, 77)
COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT = RGBColor(224, 242, 241)
COLOR_GRAY_TEXT = RGBColor(51, 51, 51)
COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
COLOR_SUCCESS_GREEN = RGBColor(39, 174, 96)
COLOR_PHASE_DISCOVERY = RGBColor(189, 195, 199)
COLOR_PHASE_PRECLINICAL = RGBColor(116, 185, 255)
COLOR_PHASE_I = RGBColor(0, 139, 139)
COLOR_PHASE_II = RGBColor(46, 204, 113)
COLOR_PHASE_III = RGBColor(241, 196, 15)
COLOR_PHASE_REG = RGBColor(231, 76, 60)

FONT_TITLE = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        p.font.color.rgb = color
    else:
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_GRAY_TEXT
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.25)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.25)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.15)

    if title:
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = title
        p.font.size = Pt(13)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
        p.font.name = FONT_TITLE
        p.space_after = Pt(6)

    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p2.text = body
        p2.font.size = Pt(10)
        p2.font.color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY
        p2.font.name = FONT_BODY
        p2.space_before = Pt(4)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, x, y):
    pill = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(1.8), Inches(0.3))
    pill.fill.solid()
    pill.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT
    pill.line.fill.background()
    tf = pill.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = label_text
    p.font.size = Pt(9)
    p.font.bold = True
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    return pill


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.3),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT
        ph.line.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
        ph.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        tf = ph.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = alt_text
        p.font.size = Pt(11)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.7),
                 "Pipeline R&D Vaccins", font_size=36, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(2.3), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.6),
                 "BioVax Therapeutics — Stratégie de Développement", font_size=18, color=COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.5),
                 "Présentation aux Investisseurs | 2025", font_size=14, color=COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1, 8)


def slide_02_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Aperçu de l'Entreprise"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
                     "Aperçu de l'Entreprise", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    add_section_label(slide, "Notre Vision", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.0))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.45), Inches(6.0), Inches(2.5),
                 "BioVax Therapeutics est une société de biotechnologie spécialisée dans le développement de vaccins innovants contre les maladies infectieuses émergentes et les cancers. Notre plateforme unique combine l'immunothérapie avec des technologies d'ARN messager pour créer des candidats-vaccins à haut potentiel.",
                 font_size=12, color=COLOR_GRAY_TEXT)

    # Three stat cards
    card_width = Inches(3.5)
    card_height = Inches(1.8)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = Inches(7.2)
    y_pos = Inches(1.45)

    stats = [
        ("6", "Vaccins en Pipeline"),
        ("3", "Candidats Cliniques"),
        ("8", "Partenariats Actifs")
    ]
    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, num, label, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY)

    # Bottom row: 3 more cards with details
    detail_cards = [
        ("Plateforme ARNm", "Technologie propriétaire de délivrance lipidique"),
        ("R&D Avancée", "Équipe de 120 scientifiques experts"),
        ("Propriété Intellectuelle", "45 brevets déposés dans le monde")
    ]
    y_pos_2 = Inches(3.6)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(detail_cards):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos_2, card_width, Inches(1.5), title, body, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 8)


def slide_03_pipeline(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Pipeline de Développement"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
                     "Pipeline de Développement", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    # Timeline phases as connected pills
    phase_data = [
        ("Découverte", COLOR_PHASE_DISCOVERY),
        ("Préclinique", COLOR_PHASE_PRECLINICAL),
        ("Phase I", COLOR_PHASE_I),
        ("Phase II", COLOR_PHASE_II),
        ("Phase III", COLOR_PHASE_III),
        ("Homologation", COLOR_PHASE_REG)
    ]

    pill_w = Inches(1.6)
    pill_h = Inches(0.5)
    arrow_w = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = Inches(1.2)
    y_timeline = Inches(1.3)

    for i, (label, color) in enumerate(phase_data):
        x = start_x + i * (pill_w + arrow_w)
        pill = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y_timeline, pill_w, pill_h)
        pill.fill.solid()
        pill.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        pill.line.fill.background()
        tf = pill.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = label
        p.font.size = Pt(10)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE if i >= 2 else COLOR_GRAY_TEXT
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    # Arrow connectors between pills
    for i in range(len(phase_data) - 1):
        x_arrow = start_x + (i + 1) * pill_w + i * arrow_w + arrow_w * 0.3
        arrow = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, x_arrow, y_timeline + Inches(0.1), arrow_w * 0.4, pill_h - Inches(0.2))
        arrow.fill.solid()
        arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
        arrow.line.fill.background()

    # Vaccine programs table below timeline
    programs = [
        ("BVX-001", "Vaccin Grippe Universelle", "Phase II", "ARNm"),
        ("BVX-002", "Candidat Anti-Mélanome", "Phase III", "Peptide"),
        ("BVX-003", "Vaccin COVID-19 Variant", "Homologation", "ARNm"),
        ("BVX-004", "Thérapie HPV", "Préclinique", "ARNm"),
        ("BVX-005", "Candidat Anti-Zika", "Phase I", "Protéine")
    ]

    y_prog = Inches(2.3)
    col_headers = [("Programme", 1.2), ("Nom du Candidat", 4.0), ("Phase Actuelle", 2.5), ("Technologie", 2.5)]
    for h_text, w in col_headers:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), y_prog, Inches(w), Inches(0.35), h_text, font_size=11, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    prog_y = y_prog + Inches(0.4)
    for j, (prog, name, phase, tech) in enumerate(programs):
        bg = COLOR_WHITE if j % 2 == 0 else COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT
        row_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.2), prog_y + j * Inches(0.45), Inches(10.2), Inches(0.4))
        row_shape.fill.solid()
        row_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg
        row_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), prog_y + j * Inches(0.45) + Inches(0.07), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3), prog, font_size=10, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.6), prog_y + j * Inches(0.45) + Inches(0.07), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3), name, font_size=10, color=COLOR_GRAY_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.8), prog_y + j * Inches(0.45) + Inches(0.07), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3), phase, font_size=10, color=COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.5), prog_y + j * Inches(0.45) + Inches(0.07), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3), tech, font_size=10, color=COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 8)


def slide_04_phase_data(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Données Phase I/II"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
                     "Données Phase I/II", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    # Chart: Efficacy rates by candidate vaccine (clustered column chart)
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["BVX-001", "BVX-002", "BVX-003"]
    chart_data.add_series("Efficacité (%)", (87.5, 92.3, 95.1))
    chart_data.add_series("Sécurité (%)", (94.2, 96.8, 97.5))

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(1.2)
    width = Inches(6.0)
    height = Inches(3.5)

    chart_frame_1 = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame_1.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 80

    # Style the chart
    for series in plot.series:
        fill = series.format.fill
        fill.solid()
        if "Efficacité" in series.name:
            fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
        else:
            fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_SUCCESS_GREEN

    # Right side: Key findings text block
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.2), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.3), Inches(0.4),
                 "Résultats Clés", font_size=18, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    findings = [
        "BVX-001 : Efficacité de 87,5% contre les souches grippales circulantes",
        "BVX-002 : Réponse immunitaire robuste chez les patients ≥65 ans",
        "BVX-003 : Maintien de l'immunité neutralisante pendant 12 mois",
        "Profil de sécurité favorable avec moins de 2% d'événements indésirables graves"
    ]

    y_findings = Inches(1.8)
    for i, finding in enumerate(findings):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), y_findings + i * Inches(0.55), Inches(5.2), Inches(0.45),
                     f"• {finding}", font_size=11, color=COLOR_GRAY_TEXT)

    # Bottom summary card
    add_card(slide, Inches(7.2), Inches(4.8), Inches(5.3), Inches(2.0),
             "Conclusion Phase I/II",
             "Les résultats confirment le potentiel clinique des candidats-vaccins BVX-001 et BVX-003 pour une progression en Phase III.",
             bg_color=COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 8)


def slide_05_phase_three_data(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Données Phase III"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
                     "Données Phase III", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    # Left chart: Line chart for safety profile over time
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    line_data = CategoryChartData()
    line_data.categories = ["Mois 1", "Mois 3", "Mois 6", "Mois 9", "Mois 12"]
    line_data.add_series("BVX-003 (n=4500)", [88, 91, 93, 94, 95])
    line_data.add_series("Placebo (n=2200)", [72, 74, 76, 78, 80])

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(1.2)
    width = Inches(5.5)
    height = Inches(3.5)

    chart_frame_2 = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, line_data)
    chart_l = chart_frame_2.chart
    chart_l.has_legend = True
    chart_l.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot_l = chart_l.plots[0]

    for series in plot_l.series:
        fill = series.format.fill
        fill.solid()
        if "BVX" in series.name:
            fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
        else:
            fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY

    # Right chart: Pie chart for adverse event distribution
    pie_data = CategoryChartData()
    pie_data.categories = ["Léger", "Modéré", "Sévère"]
    pie_data.add_series("Événements Indésirables", [68, 24, 8])

    left_pie = Inches(7.0)
    top_pie = Inches(1.2)
    width_pie = Inches(5.3)
    height_pie = Inches(3.5)

    chart_frame_3 = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left_pie, top_pie, width_pie, height_pie, pie_data)
    chart_p = chart_frame_3.chart
    chart_p.has_legend = True
    chart_p.legend.include_in_layout = False

    for i, color in enumerate([COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY, COLOR_PHASE_III, COLOR_PHASE_REG]):
        slice_fill = chart_p.series[0].points[i].format.fill
        slice_fill.solid()
        slice_fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    # Bottom summary cards
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.2), Inches(3.4), Inches(1.6),
             "Efficacité", "95,1% de réduction des infections symptomatiques", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY)

    add_card(slide, Inches(4.6), Inches(5.2), Inches(3.4), Inches(1.6),
             "Sécurité", "Taux d'événements indésirables graves < 0,8%", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY)

    add_card(slide, Inches(8.4), Inches(5.2), Inches(3.9), Inches(1.6),
             "Population", "Étude multicentrique de 6700 patients dans 12 pays", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 8)


def slide_06_market(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Opportunité de Marché"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
                     "Opportunité de Marché", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    # Market size chart: TAM / SAM / SOM
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    market_data = CategoryChartData()
    market_data.categories = ["TAM (Global)", "SAM (Régional)", "SOM (Cible 2030)"]
    market_data.add_series("Valeur ($ Milliards)", [185, 67, 12])

    left_m = Inches(0.8)
    top_m = Inches(1.2)
    width_m = Inches(5.5)
    height_m = Inches(3.5)

    chart_frame_4 = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left_m, top_m, width_m, height_m, market_data)
    chart_m = chart_frame_4.chart
    plot_m = chart_m.plots[0]

    for i in range(3):
        point_fill = plot_m.series[0].points[i].format.fill
        point_fill.solid()
        if i == 0:
            point_fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
        elif i == 1:
            point_fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
        else:
            point_fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_SUCCESS_GREEN

    # Right side market drivers text
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.2), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.3), Inches(0.4),
                 "Facteurs de Croissance", font_size=18, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    growth_factors = [
        "Augmentation des dépenses mondiales en santé (6% CAGR)",
        "Demande croissante pour vaccins contre les maladies émergentes",
        "Soutien gouvernemental accru via le CEPI et Gavi",
        "Expansion du marché ARNm au-delà de la COVID-19"
    ]

    y_gf = Inches(1.8)
    for i, factor in enumerate(growth_factors):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), y_gf + i * Inches(0.55), Inches(5.2), Inches(0.45),
                     f"• {factor}", font_size=11, color=COLOR_GRAY_TEXT)

    # Bottom row: 4 market driver cards
    driver_cards = [
        ("Croissance", "Marché vaccins : $67B d'ici 2030"),
        ("Innovation", "Plateforme ARNm polyvalente"),
        ("Partenariats", "8 contrats actifs avec des laboratoires"),
        ("Réglementaire", "Statut Fast Track pour BVX-003")
    ]

    y_drivers = Inches(5.2)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(driver_cards):
        x_d = Inches(0.8) + i * Inches(3.1)
        add_card(slide, x_d, y_drivers, Inches(2.9), Inches(1.6), title, body, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 8)


def slide_07_financials(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Projections Financières"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
                     "Projections Financières", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    # Financial chart: Revenue vs R&D spend over 5 years
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    fin_data = CategoryChartData()
    fin_data.categories = ["Année 1", "Année 2", "Année 3", "Année 4", "Année 5"]
    fin_data.add_series("Revenus ($M)", [0.5, 2.1, 8.7, 24.3, 67.5])
    fin_data.add_series("Dépenses R&D ($M)", [18.2, 22.5, 28.1, 31.4, 35.0])

    left_f = Inches(0.8)
    top_f = Inches(1.2)
    width_f = Inches(7.5)
    height_f = Inches(3.5)

    chart_frame_5 = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_STACKED, left_f, top_f, width_f, height_f, fin_data)
    chart_f = chart_frame_5.chart
    plot_f = chart_f.plots[0]

    for i, color in enumerate([COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY, COLOR_PHASE_III]):
        fill_i = plot_f.series[i].format.fill
        fill_i.solid()
        fill_i.fore_color.rgb = color

    # Right side: Key financial metrics cards
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Métriques Clés", font_size=18, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    fin_metrics = [
        ("Valeur Marchande", "$420 Millions"),
        ("Burn Rate Mensuel", "$2.1 Millions"),
        ("Trésorerie Actuelle", "$85 Millions"),
        ("Seuil de Rentabilité", "Année 4")
    ]

    y_fm = Inches(1.8)
    for i, (metric, value) in enumerate(fin_metrics):
        add_card(slide, Inches(9.0), y_fm + i * Inches(1.25), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.0), metric, value, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT)

    # Bottom summary text
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.2), Inches(11.7), Inches(1.6),
                 "Les revenus devraient croître de manière exponentielle à partir de l'homologation de BVX-003 en 2026. Le seuil de rentabilité est prévu pour l'année 4, avec une marge brute estimée à 78% sur les ventes de vaccins.",
                 font_size=12, color=COLOR_GRAY_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 7, 8)


def slide_08_team_next(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Équipe & Prochaines Étapes"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
                     "Équipe & Prochaines Étapes", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    # Team members cards (left side)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "Direction Scientifique", font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    team_members = [
        ("Dr. Marie Laurent", "PDG & Co-fondatrice\nEx-Moderna, 20 ans R&D"),
        ("Dr. Jean-Pierre Dubois", "CSO\nEx-GSK Vaccines"),
        ("Dr. Sophie Martin", "VP Développement Clinique\nEx-Novartis")
    ]

    y_team = Inches(1.5)
    for i, (name, bio) in enumerate(team_members):
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), y_team + i * Inches(1.3), Inches(5.5), Inches(1.1), name, bio, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT)

    # Next Steps timeline (right side)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(0.4),
                 "Prochaines Étapes", font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_TEAL_DARK)

    milestones = [
        ("Q2 2025", "Finalisation Phase III BVX-003"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Soumission MAA Europe (EMA)"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Homologation FDA pour BVX-003"),
        ("Q2 2026", "Lancement commercial BVX-003"),
        ("Q4 2026", "Données Phase III BVX-002")
    ]

    y_ms = Inches(1.5)
    for i, (date, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        add_card(slide, Inches(7.0), y_ms + i * Inches(1.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(0.8), date, desc, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT if i % 2 == 0 else COLOR_PHASE_III)

    # Contact info at bottom
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.5), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.4),
                 "Contact : investor.relations@biovax-therapeutics.com | www.bioVax-therapeutics.com", font_size=10, color=COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 8, 8)


# ── Main Entry Point ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    output_file = "Vaccine_R_D_Pipeline.pptx"

    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_overview(prs)
    slide_03_pipeline(prs)
    slide_04_phase_data(prs)
    slide_05_phase_three_data(prs)
    slide_06_market(prs)
    slide_07_financials(prs)
    slide_08_team_next(prs)

    prs.save(output_file)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
